핵심 큐레이션

box office weighted
Wild ‘Hope’ Livens Up Sleepy CannesWild ‘Hope’ Livens Up Sleepy Cannes
공식 · The Hollywood Reporter 6시간 전

The big-budget sci-fi action allegory, which marks the first feature from South Korean director Na Hong-jin since 2016’s horror smash 'The Wailing,' received what may be the most enthusiastic and prolonged standing ovation of any film playing in competition.The big-budget sci-fi action allegory, which marks the first feature from South Korean director Na Hong-jin since 2016’s horror smash 'The Wailing,' received what may be the most enthusiastic and prolonged standing ovation of any film playing in competition.

‘Sheep in the Box’ Review: Kore-eda’s Sweet but Limp Sci-Fi Fable About a 7-Year-Old AI Humanoid‘Sheep in the Box’ Review: Kore-eda’s Sweet but Limp Sci-Fi Fable About a 7-Year-Old AI Humanoid
공식 · Variety 6시간 전

or all the fantasy simplicity of the premise, there’s no structure to it, and though the humanoid Kakeru increases in agency and brains as the movie goes on, it still never figures out who he is.or all the fantasy simplicity of the premise, there’s no structure to it, and though the humanoid Kakeru increases in agency and brains as the movie goes on, it still never figures out who he is.

레터박스 사이트에 실시간으로 올라온 반응들입니다. 모두 옮겨보려 했는데... 너무 빠르게 많이 올라와서 중간에 많이 건너 뛰었어요. 대충 분위기는 ...레터박스 사이트에 실시간으로 올라온 반응들입니다. 모두 옮겨보려 했는데... 너무 빠르게 많이 올라와서 중간에 많이 건너 뛰었어요. 대충 분위기는 ...

'호프' 혹평. "CG가 형편없다..."'호프' 혹평. "CG가 형편없다..." (한국어)
공식 · 익스트림무비 7시간 전

인디와이어의 데이비드 얼리치가 점수를 D+ 주면서 혹평했습니다. 아래 들어가면 자세한 리뷰가 나오는데... 스포가 될 것처럼 좀 묘사가 자세해요. ht...인디와이어의 데이비드 얼리치가 점수를 D+ 주면서 혹평했습니다. 아래 들어가면 자세한 리뷰가 나오는데... 스포가 될 것처럼 좀 묘사가 자세해요. ht...

Cannes Audience Gives ‘Hope’ A 7-Minute Standing OvationCannes Audience Gives ‘Hope’ A 7-Minute Standing Ovation
공식 · Deadline 8시간 전

Filmmaker Na Hong-Jin’s in Competition sci-fi thriller Hope received a seven-minute standing ovation in Cannes this evening. Na praised the audience for staying with his two hour and forty minute epic alien thriller. During the premiere screening, at least three incredible action set-pieces drew exuberant applause. Had it ended 20 minutes earlier, the applause would’ve been […]Filmmaker Na Hong-Jin’s in Competition sci-fi thriller Hope received a seven-minute standing ovation in Cannes this evening. Na praised the audience for staying with his two hour and forty minute epic alien thriller. During the premiere screening, at least three incredible action set-pieces drew exuberant applause. Had it ended 20 minutes earlier, the applause would’ve been […]

‘Hope’ Review: It’s Aliens Vs. South Korean Villagers In Na Hong-Jin’s Wild Non-Stop Action-Driven Genre Movie – Cannes Film Festival‘Hope’ Review: It’s Aliens Vs. South Korean Villagers In Na Hong-Jin’s Wild Non-Stop Action-Driven Genre Movie – Cannes Film Festival
공식 · Deadline 8시간 전

Much has been written about this year’s Cannes Film Festival being ignored by studios and crowd-pleasing blockbuster type movies, in favor of the more familiar auteur driven quieter films. Well, fasten your seat belts. Cannes just unveiled Hope, a sci fi Alien monster mash from South Korean director Na Hong-Jin that never lets up for […]Much has been written about this year’s Cannes Film Festival being ignored by studios and crowd-pleasing blockbuster type movies, in favor of the more familiar auteur driven quieter films. Well, fasten your seat belts. Cannes just unveiled Hope, a sci fi Alien monster mash from South Korean director Na Hong-Jin that never lets up for […]

‘Hope’ Unleashes a Bats— Crazy Korean Monster Movie on Cannes and Earns 6-Minute Standing Ovation‘Hope’ Unleashes a Bats— Crazy Korean Monster Movie on Cannes and Earns 6-Minute Standing Ovation
공식 · Variety 8시간 전

“Hope” — an extremely ambitious blockbuster hopeful about an alien invasion in a sleepy South Korean mountain town — jolted the Cannes Film Festival awake on Sunday night with a 6-minute ovation. Directed by Na Hong-jin, the big-budget epic combined a gritty survival story and an original sci-fi mythology — no one quite knew what […]“Hope” — an extremely ambitious blockbuster hopeful about an alien invasion in a sleepy South Korean mountain town — jolted the Cannes Film Festival awake on Sunday night with a 6-minute ovation. Directed by Na Hong-jin, the big-budget epic combined a gritty survival story and an original sci-fi mythology — no one quite knew what […]

‘Hope’ Review: Na Hong-jin’s Overlong Creature Feature is a Guns-Blazing Riot of Bawdy Humor, Bad CGI and Brilliant Action‘Hope’ Review: Na Hong-jin’s Overlong Creature Feature is a Guns-Blazing Riot of Bawdy Humor, Bad CGI and Brilliant Action
공식 · Variety 8시간 전

For a decade, since 2016’s extraordinarily uncanny horror-hybrid “The Wailing,” fans of Korean director Na Hong-jin have been peering anxiously at the horizon awaiting his next uncategorizable genre mash-up. More recently, like a bumbling local police chief removing his mirrored aviators to squint at an unidentifiable what-the-hell-is-that wreaking havoc in the distance, we’ve tracked reports […]For a decade, since 2016’s extraordinarily uncanny horror-hybrid “The Wailing,” fans of Korean director Na Hong-jin have been peering anxiously at the horizon awaiting his next uncategorizable genre mash-up. More recently, like a bumbling local police chief removing his mirrored aviators to squint at an unidentifiable what-the-hell-is-that wreaking havoc in the distance, we’ve tracked reports […]

‘Hope’ Review: Korean Action Maestro Na Hong-jin’s Rip-Roaring Sci-Fi Creature Feature Has Instant Cult Classic Written All Over It‘Hope’ Review: Korean Action Maestro Na Hong-jin’s Rip-Roaring Sci-Fi Creature Feature Has Instant Cult Classic Written All Over It
공식 · The Hollywood Reporter 8시간 전

Hwang Jung-min, Zo In-sung and Hoyeon star in this thriller about rural villagers fending off what appears to be a violent invasion, also featuring Michael Fassbender and Alicia Vikander.Hwang Jung-min, Zo In-sung and Hoyeon star in this thriller about rural villagers fending off what appears to be a violent invasion, also featuring Michael Fassbender and Alicia Vikander.

[호프] 보그 프랑스 리뷰[호프] 보그 프랑스 리뷰 (한국어)
공식 · 익스트림무비 8시간 전

[호프]가 2026년 칸 영화제 최고의 충격작으로 떠올랐다. 다소 단조로운 경쟁 부문 라인업으로 인해 가라앉아 있던 영화제 초반 분위기 속에서, 한국의...[호프]가 2026년 칸 영화제 최고의 충격작으로 떠올랐다. 다소 단조로운 경쟁 부문 라인업으로 인해 가라앉아 있던 영화제 초반 분위기 속에서, 한국의...

‘Hope’ Cannes Film Festival Premiere Photos: Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, Hoyeon Jung & More‘Hope’ Cannes Film Festival Premiere Photos: Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, Hoyeon Jung & More
공식 · Deadline 10시간 전

The Cannes Film Festival hosted the world premiere of Hope, the latest film from director  Na Hong-Jin.  Hong-Jin was joined by the stars of the film, including Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, and Hoyeon Jung, who all walked the red carpet at the Grand Théâtre Lumière on Saturday, May 16. […]The Cannes Film Festival hosted the world premiere of Hope, the latest film from director  Na Hong-Jin.  Hong-Jin was joined by the stars of the film, including Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, and Hoyeon Jung, who all walked the red carpet at the Grand Théâtre Lumière on Saturday, May 16. […]
